data_contract.future_fence: For each raw CSV row, parse only the timestamp prefix before the first comma. Break immediately when timestamp >= 2023-01-01 broker-naive epoch. Never split, convert, hash, or otherwise inspect that row's OHLC/tick-volume tail. Report future_ohlc_parsed=false or reject.
data_contract.input_time_basis: Darwinex broker wall-clock encoded as timezone-naive Unix seconds
data_contract.selected_slice_hash: SHA256 over canonical selected pre-2023 rows only; never hash the whole market file

deviations_and_ambiguities_frozen_before.observation: Pine v1 uses confirmed 5-left/5-right pivots and its default includes wick sweeps plus breakout-and-retest sweeps. The approved card replaces this with a prior-20-bar close-back sweep.
Pine v1 requires an ordinary FVG to form and later invert through its opposite boundary. The approved card calls a newly formed ordinary three-bar gap an IFVG.
Pine v1 calculates EMA13/21/34 only on the chart timeframe. H4 bias and H1 continuation appear in the page description/card, not in executable Pine MTF code.
The Pine publication is an indicator. It has no executable entry price, stop, target, position sizing, pending lifetime, time stop, Friday close, or news rules.

The committed EA accepts only the exact adjacent triplet sweep=s[2], displacement=s[1], gap=s[0]. It does not search for a later first post-sweep FVG. Arm A explicitly freezes this first-possible adjacent interpretation.

The EA compares the middle displacement body with ATR shift=1 on the later FVG-completion bar. Arm A uses ATR known at displacement close for displacement qualification and ATR known at FVG completion for the stop buffer.

The EA checks the volatility window only when arming; an eight-bar pending order can fill after the window. Both offline arms enforce the card phrase 'trade only during' by ending the setup at its originating window boundary.

The EA's early news return does not cancel an already-placed broker pending order, so that order can fill during a blackout. Both offline arms cancel eligibility at the first USD high-impact blackout start.
The committed XAU/NDX .set files say card_defaults_source=not_found and omit the strategy inputs. The auditor binds the defaults in SPEC/EA directly, not those incomplete set files.
The canonical farm card has g0_status=APPROVED, while its prose Pipeline-Verlauf still says the 2026-05-19 draft was PENDING. The frontmatter status is treated as authoritative per the task.

The venue registry explicitly marks spread parity OPEN. Fixed symbol-specific center/adverse scenarios are bound to a read-only live DXZ snapshot; they are robustness inputs, not a spread certification.

A wide M15 bar can strictly sweep both sides of the prior-20 range. Arm A evaluates the long and short structural paths independently; it does not silently prioritize either direction. The single directional H4/H1 filter can admit at most its matching path.

Intrabar SL/TP timing is unknowable from M15 OHLC. Conservatively resolved SL/TP exits are stamped at that M15 bar's exclusive end; an exit from a 23:45 bar therefore belongs to the next broker day/year. Open-gap, time-stop, and Friday exits retain the bar-open timestamp.

execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.active_state: At most one pending setup or open position per arm and symbol. Signals completing while that state is occupied are observed in the funnel but not queued.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.atr: M15 true range with prior observed close; Wilder RMA(14), SMA seed; unavailable before 14 true ranges.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.ema: Completed aligned broker-time H1/H4 buckets only, using the last observed M15 close in each nonempty bucket. EMA alpha=2/(period+1), seeded from first HTF close; require at least period completed HTF buckets before the EMA is eligible.

entry_market_or_limit.long: At the first post-completion M15 open: ask=open+spread. If zone_bottom <= ask <= zone_top, enter market at ask. If ask > zone_top, place buy limit at zone_top. If ask < zone_bottom, void as already traversed.
entry_market_or_limit.short: At the first post-completion M15 open: bid=open. If zone_bottom <= bid <= zone_top, enter market at bid. If bid < zone_bottom, place sell limit at zone_bottom. If bid > zone_top, void as already traversed.

execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.entry_retest: The first eligible touch consumes the setup. A later gap through the limit fills at the requested limit for conservative price improvement treatment, followed by gap-aware stop processing.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.intrabar_exit_reporting_time: SL and TP exits resolved only from an M15 range are stamped at that bar's exclusive end. Day/year attribution uses that timestamp, including rollover after a 23:45 bar.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.friday_flat: Close positions at the first M15 open at or after Friday 21:00 broker time; no new Friday setup may survive that boundary.

higher_timeframe_filter_at_arm.long: last closed H4 EMA13 > EMA21 > EMA34 and last closed H1 close > EMA21 and EMA13 > EMA21
higher_timeframe_filter_at_arm.short: last closed H4 EMA13 < EMA21 < EMA34 and last closed H1 close < EMA21 and EMA13 < EMA21

execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.pending_deadline: Minimum of eight M15 bars after arm, the originating volatility-window end, the next USD news blackout start, and Friday 21:00 broker. Only bars fully ending on or before the deadline are eligible.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.same_bar_order: At an exact time/Friday boundary, flatten at bar open before intrabar ranges. Otherwise apply worse open-gap stop price first, then SL before TP whenever both are reachable. On the entry bar, assume all adverse range after entry; SL precedes TP.
execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.simultaneous_portfolio_exit_order: For closed-balance pooled drawdown only, exits with the same timestamp are processed loss-first and then win, with deterministic tie keys. This is conservative and removes alphabetical-symbol ordering dependence. Daily/yearly totals are order-invariant.

spread_model.selection_rule: No scenario averaging or selection; center is primary and adverse is mandatory robustness.

execution_overlay_shared_by_both_arms.time_stop: Flatten at the first M15 open whose timestamp is at least 32*15 minutes after the entry touch-bar open.

external_cost_contract.aggregation: Persist each deal-pair commission as integer USD cents and sum integer cents before rendering USD/R; do not aggregate binary floating-point commission values.
external_cost_contract.application: Each entry and exit deal side is rounded independently, half-up, to USD cents; native commission is assumed zero and external cost is subtracted exactly once.
external_cost_contract.NDX.DWX: round_cent_half_up(2.75 USD * volume) per deal side
external_cost_contract.XAUUSD.DWX: round_cent_half_up(deal_price * 100 oz * volume * 0.000025) per deal side
external_cost_contract.source_priority: NDX matches audit_mt5_report.py. XAU is absent from that auditor and therefore uses the exact DXZ commodity 0.0025 percent per-side notional schedule in venue_cost_model.json and the tester Groups artifact.

news_contract.affected_currency: USD for both XAUUSD.DWX and NDX.DWX
news_contract.blackout: Inclusive high-impact event_time +/- 30 minutes. Arm/market entry inside blackout is forbidden; pending eligibility ends before the next blackout start. Open positions are not force-closed for PRE30_POST30.
news_contract.broker_utc_conversion: Exact QM_DSTAware US-DST convention: broker UTC+2 outside US DST and UTC+3 during US DST; November ambiguity prefers standard offset.

A_CARD_CENTER.description: Approved-card mechanisation using the first possible adjacent closed-bar sweep/displacement/gap triplet.
long: Sweep bar low is strictly below the minimum low of its immediately preceding 20 M15 bars and sweep close is strictly above that prior minimum.
The immediately next bar is bullish and abs(close-open) >= ATR14 known at that displacement bar close.
The immediately next bar completes low > sweep.high; zone=[sweep.high, completion.low].
At the next M15 open, H4/H1 long filters, session, news, and shared execution overlay apply.
short: Sweep bar high is strictly above the maximum high of its immediately preceding 20 M15 bars and sweep close is strictly below that prior maximum.
The immediately next bar is bearish and abs(close-open) >= ATR14 known at that displacement bar close.
The immediately next bar completes high < sweep.low; zone=[completion.high, sweep.low].
At the next M15 open, H4/H1 short filters, session, news, and shared execution overlay apply.
A_CARD_CENTER.stop_atr: ATR14 known at FVG-completion close; long stop=sweep.low-0.25*ATR, short stop=sweep.high+0.25*ATR

B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.bridge_limit: Pine v1 is an indicator, so exact Pine structural primitives are combined with the same card-derived H4/H1, trade window, retest, risk, exit, news, and cost overlay. This arm is source-faithful for sweep and FVG-to-IFVG mechanics, not an assertion that the source published a complete trading strategy.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.fvg_context: After a sweep context, bind the first direction-compatible ordinary FVG created strictly later: a bearish FVG for a future bullish IFVG/long, or bullish FVG for a future bearish IFVG/short. Ignore later FVGs for that context. The bound FVG must complete inversion no later than 300 bars after the sweep and before its own 1000-start-bar expiry.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.fvg_creation: Exact Pine v1 inequalities and strict gap_size > 0.6*Pine ATR14 on the creation bar.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.ifvg_completion: Bullish only when the bound bearish FVG later closes above its top; bearish only when the bound bullish FVG later closes below its bottom. The completed IFVG zone retains the original FVG bottom/top.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.pivot_rule: Unique strict pivot high/low with five lower highs/higher lows on both sides, emitted only after the fifth right bar closes, matching official ta.pivot* causal timing. Ties do not emit a pivot.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.source_default_sweeps: Reproduce Wicks + Outbreaks & Retest state transitions, strict comparisons, 2000-bar pivot expiry, and one wick plus at most one outbreak-retest event per pivot. Deduplicate same-bar same-direction sweep events for the trade bridge; retain the sweep bar extreme for stop placement.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.state_selection: One causal sweep context per direction. The first event when no same-direction context exists starts it; later same-direction sweeps are counted but ignored until completion/expiry. Completion signals while a pending/open trade exists are counted but not queued.
B_SOURCE_FAITHFUL.stop_atr: ATR14 known at IFVG-completion close; long stop=sweep-event-bar.low-0.25*ATR, short stop=sweep-event-bar.high+0.25*ATR

known_before_contract: No QM5_10253 strategy result, report, trade list, or pre-2023 performance metric was inspected for this screen.
Only card/spec/EA/source rules, timestamp prefixes for availability, news/cost inputs, and spread metadata were inspected.
The live spread snapshot contains a 2026 tick timestamp and ask-minus-bid difference only; no 2023+ M15 OHLC was read.
prohibited_until_contract_commit: Parsing any selected M15 OHLC field
Running either arm on market outcomes
Changing a rule, spread, gate, or arm after seeing outcomes
outcome_protection.post_fail_rule: If an arm fails, report it without tuning, optimization, alternative parameter search, or OOS use.

familywise_merit_gates.adjusted_net: strictly positive pooled, for each symbol, and for each side in center

adjusted_pf.reason: Bonferroni two-arm familywise alpha allocation; no uncorrected arm selection.

familywise_merit_gates.adverse_spread: adjusted pooled net > 0, adjusted pooled PF >= 1.0, and adjusted net > 0 for each symbol
familywise_merit_gates.arm_verdict: MERIT only if every listed center and adverse gate passes; otherwise NO_MERIT
familywise_merit_gates.family_verdict: FAMILYWISE_MERIT if at least one fully preregistered arm passes its Bonferroni-adjusted gates; report both arms and do not designate a preferred arm from these DEV outcomes.

required_reporting: Integrity and future_ohlc_parsed globally and per symbol
Performance per arm/scenario and center by symbol/year/side/symbol-year
Gross and adjusted R/USD, exact external commission, PF, expectancy, win rate, DD, worst closed day
Top-two winner share, leave-best-trade-out, leave-best-year-out, same-bar conflicts, exit reasons
Every gate with observed value/pass-fail and arm/family verdict
Two independent complete executions with byte-identical canonical JSON
